applied_findings: Added bounded retry/backoff for post-deployment validation
Added fail-closed environment variable checks for deployment targets
Removed user-provided resource group/function app inputs and derived targets from environment-scoped vars
Included inherited RBAC checks at container scope
Added transient/non-retryable Azure CLI error classification
Hardened workflow input handling against shell/GITHUB_ENV injection
Pinned actions to immutable commit SHAs
Added explicit --auth-mode login for storage validation
